subheading: Run ByteDance's Seedance video model through ComfyUI: text-to-video, image-to-video, and first-last-frame, with native audio, on Comfy Cloud.
extendedDescription:
The first thing to know about Seedance comfyui workflows is that Seedance is a cloud model. It is ByteDance's video-generation family from the Seed team, and there are no public weights to download, so these workflows call it through ComfyUI's API nodes rather than loading a checkpoint. What you get in return is one of the strongest video generators available: Seedance 2.0 has topped the blind text-to-video leaderboard on Artificial Analysis, where people vote on clips without knowing which model made them.

The workflows cover the jobs people actually reach for. Text-to-video turns a written prompt into motion, image-to-video animates a still you provide, and first-last-frame (FLF2V) interpolates between two frames you set. Seedance 2.0 generates synchronized audio in the same pass, so dialogue and sound effects land with the picture instead of being added afterward, and it can produce multi-shot clips up to about fifteen seconds. It also accepts a mix of reference inputs, several images plus short video or audio clips, to steer the result.

Because these are open ComfyUI graphs around a closed model, you still control the parts that matter: the prompt, the conditioning images or frames, the duration, and the aspect ratio, which ranges from wide 21:9 down to vertical 9:16. ByteDance describes Seedance's camera control and motion as director-level and physically plausible; those are the model's own claims, but the leaderboard result is independent.

To run one, open a Seedance workflow on Comfy Cloud with nothing to install, since there is no local weight option anyway. Add your prompt or upload your frames, set the duration and aspect ratio, and generate. You can re-run with a tighter prompt until the motion and timing are right.

modelSpec.summary: Seedance is ByteDance's cloud video-generation family, accessed through ComfyUI API nodes. Seedance 2.0 adds native synchronized audio and ranks at the top of the Artificial Analysis blind text-to-video leaderboard.
highlights: Cloud model from ByteDance's Seed team; no public weights, run via ComfyUI API nodes
Seedance 2.0 generates synchronized audio in the same pass as the video
Multi-shot clips up to about fifteen seconds, with director-level camera control (ByteDance's claim)
Accepts mixed reference inputs: several images plus short video or audio clips
Aspect ratios from wide 21:9 to vertical 9:16, run on Comfy Cloud with no install

howToUse: Pick a Seedance workflow: text-to-video, image-to-video, or first-last-frame.
Open it on Comfy Cloud, which runs the ComfyUI API nodes that call Seedance.
Write your prompt, or upload the still image or the first and last frames.
Choose the duration and the aspect ratio, such as 16:9 or vertical 9:16.
Generate the clip and review the motion, timing, and any synchronized audio.
Re-run with a tighter prompt or different frames, then download the result.

whyComfy.title: A top-ranked video model in an editable graph
whyComfy.description: Seedance 2.0 sits at the top of the Artificial Analysis blind text-to-video leaderboard, and here it runs inside a ComfyUI graph you can wire into the rest of your pipeline.

whyComfy.title: Pick your variant and settings
whyComfy.description: Choose text-to-video, image-to-video, or first-last-frame, then set the duration, the aspect ratio from 21:9 to 9:16, and your reference inputs before you generate.

whyComfy.title: Native audio in the same pass
whyComfy.description: Seedance 2.0 generates synchronized dialogue and sound effects alongside the picture, so you skip the separate step of adding audio to a finished clip.

whyComfy.title: No install, no watermark
whyComfy.description: Since there are no public weights, the workflows run on Comfy Cloud through API nodes with nothing to set up, and the clips you generate carry no watermark.

faqItems.question: What are Seedance ComfyUI workflows?
faqItems.answer: They are ready-made ComfyUI graphs that run Seedance, ByteDance's cloud video model, through ComfyUI's API nodes. Each wires up a task like seedance text to video or seedance image to video, so you give a prompt or an image and get a clip without assembling the graph yourself.

faqItems.question: Can I run Seedance locally on my own GPU?
faqItems.answer: No. Seedance has no public weights to download, so it runs as a cloud model through ComfyUI's API nodes rather than on local hardware. The upside is that Comfy Cloud handles the compute, so no powerful GPU is needed on your end.

faqItems.question: What can Seedance generate?
faqItems.answer: Seedance handles text-to-video, image-to-video, and first-last-frame interpolation. Seedance 2.0 also produces synchronized audio in the same pass and can generate multi-shot clips up to about fifteen seconds long.

faqItems.question: How good is Seedance compared to other video models?
faqItems.answer: Seedance 2.0 has ranked at the top of the blind text-to-video leaderboard on Artificial Analysis, where reviewers vote on clips without knowing the source. That ranking is an independent signal, separate from ByteDance's own quality claims.

faqItems.question: Does Seedance generate audio with the video?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Seedance 2.0 generates synchronized audio in the same pass as the picture, so dialogue and sound effects line up with the action. Earlier versions focused on the video alone, with audio added separately afterward.

faqItems.question: What aspect ratios and lengths does Seedance support?
faqItems.answer: Seedance supports a range of aspect ratios, from wide 21:9 through 16:9 and square down to vertical 9:16 for social clips. Seedance 2.0 can produce multi-shot output up to roughly fifteen seconds, set by the duration you choose in the workflow.

faqItems.question: Do I need to install anything to use these workflows?
faqItems.answer: No. Because Seedance has no public weights, the graphs run on Comfy Cloud in the browser and reach the model through ComfyUI's API nodes, so there is nothing to download or set up. You open the workflow, add your prompt or frames, and generate without managing a local GPU.

faqItems.question: How much does it cost to run Seedance on Comfy Cloud?
faqItems.answer: Comfy Cloud is a paid subscription, billed per seat with tiered plans that scale credits and concurrency as you need more. Each run draws from a monthly credit pool based on active GPU time, and the API nodes that call Seedance bill against those same credits.

faqItems.question: What is the difference between Seedance 2.0 and the newer Seedance 2.5?
faqItems.answer: Seedance 2.0 is the model these workflows call today, with native audio and multi-shot clips up to about fifteen seconds. ByteDance previewed Seedance 2.5 in June 2026 with native 30-second clips, 4K output, and up to 50 reference inputs, but that build was still in staged rollout at the time of writing.
